console.assert(europeanRivers.length >= 15, 'europeanRivers has at least 15 rivers');
console.assert(europeanRivers.every((r) => typeof r.demoOnly === 'boolean'), 'every river has demoOnly boolean');
console.assert(europeanRivers.every((r) => Boolean(r.sourceType)), 'every river has sourceType');
console.assert(europeanRivers.filter((r) => r.sourceType === 'demo').every((r) => r.status !== 'VERIFIED CASE'), 'no demo river displayed as verified pollution');
